mapper.select: SELECT delta_id, source_event_id, source_event_type, target_type, target_id, counter_field, delta_value, apply_status, occurred_at, created_at, updated_at FROM bluenote_counter.counter_delta_log WHERE delta_id = #{deltaId}

SELECT delta_id, source_event_id, source_event_type, target_type, target_id, counter_field, delta_value, apply_status, occurred_at, created_at, updated_at FROM bluenote_counter.counter_delta_log WHERE delta_id = #{deltaId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE bluenote_counter.counter_delta_log SET apply_status = 'APPLIED', updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE delta_id = #{deltaId}
UPDATE bluenote_counter.counter_delta_log SET apply_status = 'FAILED', updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE delta_id = #{deltaId}
